/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gpo_02.dir/libs/glad/src/glad.c.o -o bin/gpo_02  -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL libs/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
